_comment: End-to-end tool-use golden set (sovereignty S0). Each case scores ONE model call given the real system prompt + TOOLS: did the model reach for the right tool (or correctly answer with none)? This is the instrument that decides whether a local brain is good enough to replace a cloud one — grow it from your own real corrections. `expect_tool`: the tool the model should call. `expect_no_tool`: true when a plain reply is correct (greetings, arithmetic). `expect_contains`: substrings that must appear in the reply text (lowercased match).

cases.input: what did I tell you earlier about my thesis advisor?
remind me which cloud model we decided to use
remember that my paper deadline is November 15th
what files are in my workspace?
read the file notes.md and summarise it
fetch https://example.com and tell me the page title
ingest the pdf at C:/papers/mmp.pdf into your memory
